headline: Badland Banditos: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Badland Banditos carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 77.33, led by Ja'Marr Chase, Brock Bowers, and Kenneth Walker. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jayden Higgins at 51.4 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ja'Marr Chase (99.6), Brock Bowers (99.0), and Kenneth Walker (87.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jayden Higgins is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 51.4. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 12 offensive players, with 4 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 75.23.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 12 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
